column1: The 246 SKIP results are split into two groups:
CATEGORY 1: Likely Relevant — Domain suggests influencer/creator/media/agency
→ Recommendation: MANUAL REVIEW by data team
→ These domains may be founder/agency sites where Claude couldn't extract enough context
Off-ICP (clearly not influencer/creator agencies) — 156 domains (137 leads)
1. List quality: Mixed sourcing — includes non-agency contacts alongside real agencies
2. Scrape limitation: Small/founder-focused sites have minimal public content
3. Claude criteria: Requires SPECIFIC operational pain + economic cost → generic B2B content doesn't match
- Established agencies with rich website content

- "Running creator campaigns across music and entertainment at your volume means manually verifying audience data for each brief takes 2-3 hours — and brand safety gaps still slip through before the contract goes out."

- "Managing influencer campaigns in fintech and B2B SaaS means verifying creator audience demographics against client compliance requirements eats 2-3 hours per brief — and platform fragmentation across IG
column3: and YouTube means that verification happens separately for each channel."

column1: Option A: Manual review of 90 "possibly relevant" domains
- Potential gain: +10-20 additional openers if 10-25% are actual agencies
- ROI: Moderate (but improves list quality for future reuse)
Option B: Use Category 1 list as-is for outreach
- Send with generic opener if cf_business_observation is empty
Option C: Focus on 37 enriched + Category 1 "likely relevant"
- Send bulk generic opener to Category 1 domains
